query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT e.id, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', p.sortOrder, NOW(), NOW()
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON c.establishmentId = e.id AND c.name = 'Hambúrgueres Artesanais'
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Da Casa' as name, 'Pão artesanal, hambúrguer blend da casa 200g, queijo provolone, bacon, cebola roxa e molho secreto' as description, 36.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Costela Desfiada', 'Pão de fermentação natural, costela desfiada, queijo coalho, cebola crispy e BBQ', 39.90, 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Picanha Burger', 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer de picanha 180g, queijo gruyère, alho negro e chimichurri', 42.90, 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Smash Duplo', 'Pão de batata, 2 smash burgers 90g, queijo americano, picles e molho especial', 34.90, 4
) p
WHERE e.userId = 180577;
